description: Concrete barrier or metal guardrail visibly cracked, bent, or displaced from anchor points
visual_signals: bent metal railing
cracked concrete jersey barrier
exposed rebar at barrier base

description: Burned-out or missing light fixtures in stairwells or driving lanes creating dark zones
visual_signals: dark patches in driving lane
non-illuminated stairwell fixture
broken light lens on ceiling

description: Faded or absent lane markings and directional arrows causing navigation confusion
visual_signals: barely visible yellow lane stripe
missing directional arrow on pavement
worn crosswalk lines

description: Speed bump missing, broken, or lacking reflective paint for visibility
visual_signals: gap where speed bump was removed
crumbled rubber speed bump segments
speed bump without yellow paint

description: Fire extinguisher cabinet blocked by parked vehicles or stored materials
visual_signals: objects stacked in front of red cabinet
vehicle parked against fire equipment niche
extinguisher missing from wall bracket

description: Pedestrian walkway not physically separated from vehicle traffic with bollards or curbing
visual_signals: pedestrians walking in driving lane
missing bollard posts along walkway
no painted pedestrian path

description: Standing water pooling on driving surface or ramp indicating drainage failure
visual_signals: puddle spanning full lane width
water streaming down ramp surface
stained concrete from chronic pooling

description: Carbon monoxide detector absent or visibly non-functional in enclosed parking level
visual_signals: no CO detector on ceiling of enclosed level
detector with dangling wires
detector indicator light off

description: EV charging station with damaged cables, cracked housing, or scorch marks
visual_signals: frayed charging cable insulation
cracked charger housing
black scorch marks on charger unit

description: Elevator lobby or stairwell emergency lighting non-functional or missing battery backup
visual_signals: dark emergency light fixture
emergency light with no test button glow
missing exit sign above stairwell door

description: Structural concrete showing spalling, delamination, exposed rebar, or efflorescence indicating water intrusion and reinforcement corrosion
visual_signals: concrete surface flaking with chunks broken away exposing rusted rebar underneath
white calcium efflorescence streaks running down concrete beam or column face
overhead concrete slab with visible delamination cracks and rust staining at rebar lines

description: Structural concrete cracking in concerning patterns including map cracking, longitudinal cracks along beams, or widening cracks at column bases
visual_signals: interconnected map crack pattern across parking deck slab surface
longitudinal crack running along the underside of a concrete beam
widening crack at base of load-bearing column with visible gap

description: Expansion joint seals deteriorated, missing, or filled with debris allowing water penetration to lower levels
visual_signals: expansion joint with cracked and separated rubber seal material
open expansion joint gap filled with dirt and debris with no seal remaining
water dripping through expansion joint onto vehicles or surface below

description: Clearance height signage missing, inaccurate, or not illuminated at garage entry points and low-clearance areas
visual_signals: garage entry lacking posted clearance height sign
clearance bar hanging with no accompanying height measurement sign
low-clearance area with pipe or duct hanging below posted height and no updated warning

description: ADA accessible parking spaces insufficient in number, missing required signage, lacking proper access aisle width, or with deteriorated ramp condition
visual_signals: accessible parking sign post missing or too low below required mounting height
access aisle between accessible spaces with faded or missing hatched markings
curb ramp at accessible space with cracked surface or missing detectable warning pad

description: Van-accessible parking space missing required signage designation or lacking adequate vertical clearance for wheelchair van access
visual_signals: accessible space without supplemental van-accessible sign below main placard
van-accessible space with overhead pipe or structure reducing clearance below 98 inches
access aisle at van space narrower than required 96-inch width with faded markings

description: Fire standpipe connections inaccessible, missing protective caps, lacking identification signage, or obstructed by parked vehicles
visual_signals: standpipe hose connection valve missing cap with threads exposed and corroded
no standpipe identification sign on wall near connection point
vehicle parked directly in front of standpipe connection blocking firefighter access

description: Ventilation system in enclosed parking structure non-functional with jet fans inoperative or CO monitoring display showing fault condition
visual_signals: ceiling-mounted jet fan with visible damage or disconnected electrical conduit
CO monitoring display panel showing error code or blank screen
enclosed parking level with visible haze or exhaust accumulation indicating poor ventilation

description: Emergency call station or panic button non-functional, vandalized, or missing from required locations in parking structure
visual_signals: emergency call box with smashed button or torn-out handset
blue light emergency phone station with light not illuminated
parking level lacking any visible emergency call station or panic button

description: Security camera coverage gaps or non-functional cameras at entry points, stairwells, and elevator lobbies in parking structure
visual_signals: security camera with dangling wires or tilted off intended viewing angle
camera housing with cracked dome or lens covered by dirt and spider webs
stairwell entrance or elevator lobby with no visible camera installation

description: Convex mirrors missing or damaged at blind corners, ramp curves, and pedestrian crossing intersections
visual_signals: blind corner at driving ramp turn with no convex mirror installed
convex mirror cracked or clouded preventing useful reflection
empty mounting bracket on wall at curve where mirror was removed

description: Elevator or stair lobby wayfinding deficient with missing floor level signage, absent color coding, or confusing directional indicators
visual_signals: stairwell door lacking floor level number identification on both sides
elevator lobby without posted you-are-here map or directional signage to exits
parking level with no color coding or numbering visible on columns or walls

description: Anti-terrorism vehicle barriers including bollards and cable barriers missing, damaged, or inadequate at pedestrian gathering areas and building entries
visual_signals: pedestrian entrance from garage to building lacking protective bollard installation
bollard at building entry visibly damaged or tilted from impact with no repair
cable barrier system with slack or disconnected cable between anchor posts

description: Wheel stops improperly installed, creating tripping hazard, or missing reflective marking for pedestrian visibility
visual_signals: wheel stop shifted out of position from anchors sitting loose in parking space
wheel stop in pedestrian walkway area creating trip hazard at ankle height
concrete wheel stop with no reflective yellow paint making it invisible in low light

description: Payment equipment with damaged housing, exposed electrical wiring, or lacking ADA-accessible controls for wheelchair users
visual_signals: parking pay station with cracked housing panel exposing internal wiring
payment kiosk screen and buttons mounted above wheelchair-accessible reach height
gate arm mechanism with exposed wiring at base from damaged conduit cover

description: Snow and ice management deficient with untreated ramp surfaces, missing salt and sand dispensers, or no heated ramp indicators where required
visual_signals: ice formation on parking ramp driving surface with no salt or treatment visible
empty or missing sand and salt dispenser station at ramp entry
heated ramp system with no indicator signage and visible ice accumulation suggesting failure

description: Bicycle parking area with damaged racks, insufficient lighting, or inadequate separation from vehicle traffic lanes
visual_signals: bicycle rack with bent or broken mounting arms unable to secure bikes
bike parking area in dark corner with no dedicated light fixture
bicycle parking located in active driving lane without any physical barrier separation

description: Electric vehicle charging station area lacking proper cable management, missing safety signage, or without protective bollards preventing vehicle impact damage
visual_signals: EV charging cables draped across driving lane creating trip and vehicle hazard
charging station area missing required electrical hazard or operating instruction signage
EV charger pedestal with no protective bollard between unit and adjacent parking space

description: Roof deck drainage deficient with clogged scuppers, blocked overflow drains, or visible ponding indicating failed waterproofing
visual_signals: roof level scupper drain opening blocked with debris and leaves
standing water ponding on roof deck surface with visible waterline staining
overflow drain pipe clogged with sediment and no water flow path visible

description: Stairwell in parking structure with damaged treads, missing handrails, insufficient lighting, or debris creating fall hazard
visual_signals: stair tread with broken concrete edge or missing non-slip nosing strip
stairwell section with handrail detached from wall mounting brackets
parking garage stairwell with debris, litter, and standing water on landing

description: Garage entry and exit gate arms damaged, malfunctioning, or creating entrapment hazard with no breakaway feature
visual_signals: gate arm cracked or splintered from vehicle impact still in service
gate mechanism cycling erratically opening and closing without vehicle trigger
gate arm lacking breakaway joint that could trap vehicle or pedestrian

description: Waterproofing membrane failure on parking deck surfaces with visible cracking, bubbling, or delamination of traffic coating
visual_signals: traffic coating on parking deck peeling and delaminating in large sections
bubbling or blistering in deck waterproofing membrane surface
exposed concrete visible through worn-away traffic coating at turning areas and ramps
